char_overview: Scholar's calm bordering on detachment. Summons heroic spirit armor through 神备 to counter 扭曲.
char_looks: 188cm. Short black hair tied in a ponytail at the nape Black eyes, calm and detached. White fluffy jacket, black sweater, black trousers, black sneakers. Short staff and arm shield, 灵力 carriers for heroic spirit weapons and armor. Both usable in melee.
char_flaws: Prefers research over combat; Reluctant to escalate.; Taps his shoulder with his short staff to unwind.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-神备: Establishes 灵力 links with heroic spirits and manifests them as armor around his body for combat. Currently linked: 列奥尼达斯 (grants unyielding defense), 建御雷神 (grants lightning-imbued protection). Each manifestation drains 灵力 proportional to the spirit's intensity, Switching spirits mid-combat requires a brief disengagement.; 通神: Communicates with heroic spirits by studying historical ruins, texts, and artifacts. Recognition from a spirit is required before a link can be established for 神备.
char_mission: Engaged in 狩灵协会6科's distortion suppression missions while continuing archaeological excavation and research.
char_origin: Studied archaeology at university, awakened 灵力 during an excavation at an ancient site, gaining the ability to commune with heroic spirits. Joined 狩灵协会2科, later transferred to 狩灵协会6科 when it was established.

char_relationships.狩灵协会2科: Former department, left on amicable terms. Occasionally consulted by former colleagues on cases with historical or archaeological dimensions.
